title: Rich Creamy Mediterranean Feta Flatbread
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly dish featuring golden syrup and double-rise bread, perfect for a solo dinner. This fatty and creamy flatbread is filled with Mediterranean flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the double-rise bread into 1-inch thick slices.
In a small bowl, mix together the crumbled feta cheese, chopped parsley, and minced garlic.
Spread the feta mixture evenly onto each bread slice.
Top the feta mixture with kalamata olives, artichoke hearts, and sun-dried tomatoes.
Drizzle the golden syrup over the toppings.
Drizzle the olive oil over the flatbread.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Bake the flatbread in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the bread is toasted and the cheese is melted.
Remove the flatbread from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
